F0800Z_STF_NO_ACTVTY_CD F0800Z Staff Assessment: None of Above Activity Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that there were no daily or activity preferences identified during staff assessment. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
